use_cases: Standard text input for forms in web applications
Search input fields with custom webkit styling
File upload input with styled file button
Accessible form inputs with focus ring indicators
ai_summary: A modern, styled text input component built on React forwardRef that wraps the native HTML input element. Supports multiple input types including standard text, search, and file uploads with custom styling for each. Features focus-visible ring states, shadow effects, and disabled styling for enhanced accessibility and UX.
